sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try rotating the top track red controller and check if level completes
# First, let me save the current state
current_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("=== BEFORE top red ===")
print(f"Top horizontal: {current_ascii[17][14:56]}")
print(f"Middle horizontal: {current_ascii[26][14:56]}")
print(f"Bottom horizontal: {current_ascii[35][14:56]}")

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 18, 'col': 20}])

print(f"\nLevel completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed', 'unknown')}")

after_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== AFTER top red ===")
print(f"Top horizontal: {after_ascii[17][14:56]}")
print(f"Middle horizontal: {after_ascii[26][14:56]}")
print(f"Bottom horizontal: {after_ascii[35][14:56]}")

# Check all changed rows
before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
changed = [i for i in range(64) if before[i] != after[i]]
print(f"\nChanged rows: {changed}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
